title: VimFu — gx Open URL or File
description: gx opens the URL or file path under the cursor in your default browser or application. Click links without leaving Vim.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: G X opens whatever the cursor is on — a URL, a file path, anything — using your system's default handler.
Press G X. On your normal machine, your browser pops open to that page.
Quick disclaimer — the recording environment for these videos has no GUI to launch into, so the screen just sits there. On your machine that browser would already be open.
G X works the same way on file paths and anything else your system knows how to open — markdown previews, images, PDFs, you name it.
G X. Follow a link or open a file without ever leaving Vim.
